name: CZ75自动型 | 翡翠石英
descriptionEn: A fully automatic variant of the CZ75, the CZ75-Auto is the ideal short-term choice for turning the tables and gaining your opponents weapon. But with very little ammo in the magazine, strong trigger discipline is required. It has been painted with green metallic paint and uses a crystallizing mask to create a pattern. Everyone wants to make an impact
descriptionZh: 一把全自动的 CZ75 手枪变种，在扭转局势以及获取敌人武器时，CZ75 自动手枪是一个短期的理想选择。但弹夹中的弹药极少，你需要节约每一发子弹。 枪身涂有绿色金属质感喷漆并使用结晶模具压印图案。 谁都想改变战局
